creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
VLC with the nvidia driver 535.146.02 gives the errors below (it works worse than the previous driver,vers. 535.104.05) :

VLC media player 3.0.20 Vetinari (revision 3.0.20-0-g6f0d0ab126b)
